name: Dust of Dryness
overview: A powder that can absorb water or damage water creatures.

properties.composition: This small packet contains 1d6 + 4 pinches of dust

water_absorption.activation: As a Utilize action, you can sprinkle a pinch of the dust over water, turning up to a 15-foot Cube of water into one marble-sized pellet, which floats or rests near where the dust was sprinkled
water_absorption.release: A creature can take a Utilize action to smash the pellet against a hard surface, causing the pellet to shatter and release the water the dust absorbed. Doing so destroys the pellet and ends its magic

elemental_damage.activation: As a Utilize action, you can sprinkle a pinch of the dust on an Elemental within 5 feet of yourself that is composed mostly of water (such as a Water Elemental or a Water Weird)
elemental_damage.saving_throw: Such a creature exposed to a pinch of the dust makes a DC 13 Constitution saving throw
elemental_damage.damage: Taking 10d6 Necrotic damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one
